title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Lemon Tree Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Lemon Tree Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Lemon Tree Hotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lemon Tree Hotels:
Lemon Tree Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lemon Tree Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
